title: Amtech F3360 80mm (3") Twist knot wire cup brush
features: TOUGH CLEANING: This 80mm (3") twist knot wire cup brush has wires twisted into tight spirals to maximise the abrasive action
12,500 RPM: With an M14 x 2 arbor, it operates a maximum 12,500 RPM
SIZE CAPACITY: 3 inch range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Brush See more
